examples.text: وَإِنْ كَانَ رَجُلٌ يُورَثُ كَلَالَةً أَوِ ٱمْرَأَةٌ وَلَهُ أَخٌ أَوْ أُخْتٌ فَلِكُلِّ وَاحِدٍ مِنْهُمَا ٱلسُّدُسُ
examples.english: And if a man or woman leaves neither ascendants nor descendants but has a brother or a sister, then for each one of them is a sixth.

examples.text: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِي ٱشْتَرَاهُ مِنْ مِصْرَ لِٱمْرَأَتِهِ أَكْرِمِي مَثْوَاهُ
examples.english: And the one from Egypt who bought him said to his wife, "Make his residence comfortable."

etymology.text: Compare its plural forms to Hebrew נשים (nashím, “women”).
